meaning: n.光辉,闪烁,辐射率,深粉红色
examples: The dim bulb of the bedside lamp cast a soft radiance over his face.
She has the vigour and radiance of someone young enough to be her granddaughter.
At night, these streets are brilliant with the pearly radiance of electricity.
The filters on Pixlr Express illuminate the radiance of everyday existence by making it spectacular.
The researchers then measured the amount of light, or radiance, present in each unit of the grid.
